name: 4-Day Tour: Marrakech → Merzouga + Nomad Day → Fes

seo.title: 4-Day Marrakech Merzouga Fes Tour — Sahara & Nomadic Families | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 4-day tour from Marrakech to Fes: Ait Ben Haddou, Dades, Todra, Merzouga desert with a full day of nomadic immersion (4x4, nomadic families), cedar forest, Ifrane.

intro: This 4-day tour enriches the classic Marrakech-Fes itinerary with a full day exploring the Merzouga desert: a 4x4 visit to nomadic desert families, the Gnawa music of Khamlia, sandboarding. A complete immersion between imperial cities, Atlas landscapes and Sahara life.
